title: Personal Portfolio
description: Developer portfolio with terminal aesthetic and command palette navigation.
outcome: Live portfolio site with sub-1.5s FCP and keyboard-first navigation.
problem: Needed a portfolio that communicates technical depth to a developer audience while remaining fast and accessible.
approach: Built with Next.js App Router, custom Tailwind v4 design tokens, and a cmdk command palette for keyboard-first navigation.
result: Achieved Lighthouse 95+ performance score with rich developer-oriented UX and a distinctive terminal aesthetic.

title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
description: High-throughput analytics dashboard visualising live event streams for a SaaS product.
outcome: Reduced time-to-insight from 5 minutes to under 10 seconds for operational teams.
problem: Operational teams were working off stale batch reports, missing real-time anomalies that caused customer-facing incidents.
approach: Designed a WebSocket-powered data pipeline feeding a React dashboard with D3 visualisations, deployed on the existing Node.js infrastructure.
result: Reduced mean-time-to-detect incidents by 70%; dashboard adopted by three internal teams within the first month.
